verses.latin_vulgate: Dixit autem Dominus ad Moysen : Ingredere ad Pharaonem, et loquere ad eum : Hæc dicit Dominus Deus Hebræorum : Dimitte populum meum ut sacrificet mihi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר יְהֹוָה֙ אֶל־מֹשֶׁ֔ה בֹּ֖א אֶל־פַּרְעֹ֑ה וְדִבַּרְתָּ֣ אֵלָ֗יו כֹּֽה־אָמַ֤ר יְהֹוָה֙ אֱלֹהֵ֣י הָֽעִבְרִ֔ים שַׁלַּ֥ח אֶת־עַמִּ֖י וְיַֽעַבְדֻֽנִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord said to Moses: Go in to Pharao, and speak to him: Thus saith the Lord God of the Hebrews: Let my people go to sacrifice to me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Herra sanoi Mosekselle mene Pharaon tykö, ja sano hänelle: näin sanoo Herra Hebrealaisten Jumala: päästä minun kansani palvelemaan minua.
verses.king_james: Then the Lord said unto Moses, Go in unto Pharaoh, and tell him, Thus saith the Lord God of the Hebrews, Let my people go, that they may serve me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quod si adhuc renuis, et retines eos,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֛י אִם־מָאֵ֥ן אַתָּ֖ה לְשַׁלֵּ֑חַ וְעוֹדְךָ֖ מַחֲזִ֥יק בָּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: But if thou refuse, and withhold them still:
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaan jolles päästä, mutta vielä pidätät heitä:
verses.king_james: For if thou refuse to let them go, and wilt hold them still,

verses.latin_vulgate: ecce manus mea erit super agros tuos, et super equos, et asinos, et camelos, et boves, et oves, pestis valde gravis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּ֨ה יַד־יְהֹוָ֜ה הוֹיָ֗ה בְּמִקְנְךָ֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר בַּשָּׂדֶ֔ה בַּסּוּסִ֤ים בַּֽחֲמֹרִים֙ בַּגְּמַלִּ֔ים בַּבָּקָ֖ר וּבַצֹּ֑אן דֶּ֖בֶר כָּבֵ֥ד מְאֹֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: Behold my hand shall be upon thy fields; and a very grievous murrain upon thy horses, and asses, and camels, and oxen, and sheep.
verses.finnish_biblia: Katso, Herran käsi on sinun karjas päällä, jotka ovat kedolla, hevosten päällä, aasein päällä, kamelein päällä, härkäin päällä, lammasten päällä, sangen raskaan ruttotaudin kanssa.
verses.king_james: Behold, the hand of the Lord is upon thy cattle which is in the field, upon the horses, upon the asses, upon the camels, upon the oxen, and upon the sheep: there shall be a very grievous murrain.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et faciet Dominus mirabile inter possessiones Israël et possessiones Ægyptiorum, ut nihil omnino pereat ex eis quæ pertinent ad filios Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִפְלָ֣ה יְהֹוָ֔ה בֵּ֚ין מִקְנֵ֣ה יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל וּבֵ֖ין מִקְנֵ֣ה מִצְרָ֑יִם וְלֹ֥א יָמ֛וּת מִכׇּל־לִבְנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל דָּבָֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord will make a wonderful difference between the possessions of Israel and the possessions of the Egyptians, that nothing at all shall die of those things that belong to the children of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra on eroittava Israelin karjan Egyptin karjasta, niin ettei mitään kuole kaikesta kuin Israelin lapsilla on.
verses.king_james: And the Lord shall sever between the cattle of Israel and the cattle of Egypt: and there shall nothing die of all that is the children’s of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Constituitque Dominus tempus, dicens : Cras faciet Dominus verbum istud in terra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֥שֶׂם יְהֹוָ֖ה מוֹעֵ֣ד לֵאמֹ֑ר מָחָ֗ר יַעֲשֶׂ֧ה יְהֹוָ֛ה הַדָּבָ֥ר הַזֶּ֖ה בָּאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord appointed a time, saying: To morrow will the Lord do this thing in the land.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra määräsi ajan, sanoen: tämän Herra tekee huomenna maassa.
verses.king_james: And the Lord appointed a set time, saying, To morrow the Lord shall do this thing in the land.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecit ergo Dominus verbum hoc altera die : mortuaque sunt omnia animantia Ægyptiorum ; de animalibus vero filiorum Israël, nihil omnino periit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֨עַשׂ יְהֹוָ֜ה אֶת־הַדָּבָ֤ר הַזֶּה֙ מִֽמׇּחֳרָ֔ת וַיָּ֕מׇת כֹּ֖ל מִקְנֵ֣ה מִצְרָ֑יִם וּמִמִּקְנֵ֥ה בְנֵֽי־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל לֹא־מֵ֥ת אֶחָֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord therefore did this thing the next day: and all the beasts of the Egyptians died, but of the beasts of the children of Israel there died not one.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra teki niin toisna päivänä, ja kaikki Egyptin karja kuoli: vaan Israelin lasten karjasta ei yhtäkään kuollut.
verses.king_james: And the Lord did that thing on the morrow, and all the cattle of Egypt died: but of the cattle of the children of Israel died not one.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et misit Pharao ad videndum : nec erat quidquam mortuum de his quæ possidebat Israël. Ingravatumque est cor Pharaonis, et non dimisit populum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁלַ֣ח פַּרְעֹ֔ה וְהִנֵּ֗ה לֹא־מֵ֛ת מִמִּקְנֵ֥ה יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל עַד־אֶחָ֑ד וַיִּכְבַּד֙ לֵ֣ב פַּרְעֹ֔ה וְלֹ֥א שִׁלַּ֖ח אֶת־הָעָֽם׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And Pharao sent to see; and there was not any thing dead of that which Israel possessed. And Pharao's heart was hardened, and he did not let the people go.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Pharao lähetti (tiedustelemaan) ja katso, ei ollut Israelin karjasta yhtäkään kuollut. Mutta Pharaon sydän paatui, ja ei päästänyt kansaa.
verses.king_james: And Pharaoh sent, and, behold, there was not one of the cattle of the Israelites dead. And the heart of Pharaoh was hardened, and he did not let the people go.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixit Dominus ad Moysen et Aaron : Tollite plenas manus cineris de camino, et spargat illum Moyses in cælum coram Pharaone.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר יְהֹוָה֮ אֶל־מֹשֶׁ֣ה וְאֶֽל־אַהֲרֹן֒ קְח֤וּ לָכֶם֙ מְלֹ֣א חׇפְנֵיכֶ֔ם פִּ֖יחַ כִּבְשָׁ֑ן וּזְרָק֥וֹ מֹשֶׁ֛ה הַשָּׁמַ֖יְמָה לְעֵינֵ֥י פַרְעֹֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord said to Moses and Aaron: Take to you handfuls of ashes out of the chimney, and let Moses sprinkle it in the air in the presence of Pharao.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra sanoi Mosekselle ja Aaronille: ottakaat kätenne täyteen toton nokea, ja Moses paiskatkaan sen taivaasen päin Pharaon edessä.
verses.king_james: And the Lord said unto Moses and unto Aaron, Take to you handfuls of ashes of the furnace, and let Moses sprinkle it toward the heaven in the sight of Pharaoh.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sitque pulvis super omnem terram Ægypti : erunt enim in hominibus et jumentis ulcera, et vesicæ turgentes in universa terra Ægypti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֣ה לְאָבָ֔ק עַ֖ל כׇּל־אֶ֣רֶץ מִצְרָ֑יִם וְהָיָ֨ה עַל־הָאָדָ֜ם וְעַל־הַבְּהֵמָ֗ה לִשְׁחִ֥ין פֹּרֵ֛חַ אֲבַעְבֻּעֹ֖ת בְּכׇל־אֶ֥רֶץ מִצְרָֽיִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And be there dust upon all the land of Egypt: for there shall be boils and swelling blains both in men and beasts, in the whole land of Egypt.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja pitää tuleman tomuksi koko Egyptin maan päälle, ja pitää oleman ihmisten ja karjan päällä märkäpäistä punottavaiset paisumat koko Egyptin maalla.
verses.king_james: And it shall become small dust in all the land of Egypt, and shall be a boil breaking forth with blains upon man, and upon beast, throughout all the land of Egypt.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tuleruntque cinerem de camino, et steterunt coram Pharaone, et sparsit illum Moyses in cælum : factaque sunt ulcera vesicarum turgentium in hominibus et jumentis :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקְח֞וּ אֶת־פִּ֣יחַ הַכִּבְשָׁ֗ן וַיַּֽעַמְדוּ֙ לִפְנֵ֣י פַרְעֹ֔ה וַיִּזְרֹ֥ק אֹת֛וֹ מֹשֶׁ֖ה הַשָּׁמָ֑יְמָה וַיְהִ֗י שְׁחִין֙ אֲבַעְבֻּעֹ֔ת פֹּרֵ֕חַ בָּאָדָ֖ם וּבַבְּהֵמָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they took ashes out of the chimney, and stood before Pharao, and Moses sprinkled it in the air; and there came boils with swelling blains in men and beasts.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he ottivat nokea totosta, ja seisoivat Pharaon edessä, ja Moses paiskasi sen taivaasen päin: niin tulivat märkäpäistä punottavaiset paisumat ihmisiin ja karjaan.
verses.king_james: And they took ashes of the furnace, and stood before Pharaoh; and Moses sprinkled it up toward heaven; and it became a boil breaking forth with blains upon man, and upon beast.

verses.latin_vulgate: nec poterant malefici stare coram Moyse propter ulcera quæ in illis erant, et in omni terra Ægypti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלֹֽא־יָכְל֣וּ הַֽחַרְטֻמִּ֗ים לַעֲמֹ֛ד לִפְנֵ֥י מֹשֶׁ֖ה מִפְּנֵ֣י הַשְּׁחִ֑ין כִּֽי־הָיָ֣ה הַשְּׁחִ֔ין בַּֽחַרְטֻמִּ֖ם וּבְכׇל־מִצְרָֽיִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Neither could the magicians stand before Moses, for the boils that were upon them, and in all the land of Egypt.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin ettei noidatkaan saaneet seisoa Moseksen edessä paisumain tähden: sillä paisumat olivat niin noitain päällä, kuin kaikkien Egyptiläisten.
verses.king_james: And the magicians could not stand before Moses because of the boils; for the boil was upon the magicians, and upon all the Egyptians.

verses.latin_vulgate: Induravitque Dominus cor Pharaonis, et non audivit eos, sicut locutus est Dominus ad Moysen.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְחַזֵּ֤ק יְהֹוָה֙ אֶת־לֵ֣ב פַּרְעֹ֔ה וְלֹ֥א שָׁמַ֖ע אֲלֵהֶ֑ם כַּאֲשֶׁ֛ר דִּבֶּ֥ר יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶל־מֹשֶֽׁה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord hardened Pharao's heart, and he hearkened not unto them, as the Lord had spoken to Moses.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Herra paadutti Pharaon sydämen, ja ei hän kuullut heitä: niinkuin Herra Mosekselle sanonut oli.
verses.king_james: And the Lord hardened the heart of Pharaoh, and he hearkened not unto them; as the Lord had spoken unto Moses.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque Dominus ad Moysen : Mane consurge, et sta coram Pharaone, et dices ad eum : Hæc dicit Dominus Deus Hebræorum : Dimitte populum meum ut sacrificet mihi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר יְהֹוָה֙ אֶל־מֹשֶׁ֔ה הַשְׁכֵּ֣ם בַּבֹּ֔קֶר וְהִתְיַצֵּ֖ב לִפְנֵ֣י פַרְעֹ֑ה וְאָמַרְתָּ֣ אֵלָ֗יו כֹּֽה־אָמַ֤ר יְהֹוָה֙ אֱלֹהֵ֣י הָֽעִבְרִ֔ים שַׁלַּ֥ח אֶת־עַמִּ֖י וְיַֽעַבְדֻֽנִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord said to Moses: Arise in the morning, and stand before Pharao, and thou shalt say to him: Thus saith the Lord, the God of the Hebrews: Let my people go to sacrifice to me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin sanoi Herra Mosekselle: nouse huomenna varhain, ja seiso Pharaon edessä, ja sano hänelle: Näin sanoo Herra Hebrealaisten Jumala: päästä minun kansani palvelemaan minua.
verses.king_james: And the Lord said unto Moses, Rise up early in the morning, and stand before Pharaoh, and say unto him, Thus saith the Lord God of the Hebrews, Let my people go, that they may serve me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia in hac vice mittam omnes plagas meas super cor tuum, et super servos tuos, et super populum tuum : ut scias quod non sit similis mei in omni terra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י ׀ בַּפַּ֣עַם הַזֹּ֗את אֲנִ֨י שֹׁלֵ֜חַ אֶת־כׇּל־מַגֵּפֹתַי֙ אֶֽל־לִבְּךָ֔ וּבַעֲבָדֶ֖יךָ וּבְעַמֶּ֑ךָ בַּעֲב֣וּר תֵּדַ֔ע כִּ֛י אֵ֥ין כָּמֹ֖נִי בְּכׇל־הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For I will at this time send all my plagues upon thy heart, and upon thy servants, and upon thy people; that thou mayst know that there is none like me in all the earth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Muutoin minä tällä haavaa lähetän kaikki minun rangaistukseni sinun sydämees, ja sinun palveliais, ja sinun kansas päälle, tietääkses, ettei kaikessa maassa ole minun vertaani;
verses.king_james: For I will at this time send all my plagues upon thine heart, and upon thy servants, and upon thy people; that thou mayest know that there is none like me in all the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nunc enim extendens manum percutiam te, et populum tuum peste, peribisque de terra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י עַתָּה֙ שָׁלַ֣חְתִּי אֶת־יָדִ֔י וָאַ֥ךְ אוֹתְךָ֛ וְאֶֽת־עַמְּךָ֖ בַּדָּ֑בֶר וַתִּכָּחֵ֖ד מִן־הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For now I will stretch out my hand to strike thee, and thy people, with pestilence, and thou shalt perish from the earth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä minä olisin nyt jo ojentanut käteni, ja lyönyt sinun ja sinun kansas ruttotaudilla: että sinun olis täytynyt hukkua maan päältä.
verses.king_james: For now I will stretch out my hand, that I may smite thee and thy people with pestilence; and thou shalt be cut off from the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Idcirco autem posui te, ut ostendam in te fortitudinem meam, et narretur nomen meum in omni terra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאוּלָ֗ם בַּעֲב֥וּר זֹאת֙ הֶעֱמַדְתִּ֔יךָ בַּעֲב֖וּר הַרְאֹתְךָ֣ אֶת־כֹּחִ֑י וּלְמַ֛עַן סַפֵּ֥ר שְׁמִ֖י בְּכׇל־הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And therefore have I raised thee, that I may shew my power in thee, and my name may be spoken of throughout all the earth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta tosin sentähden olen minä sinun antanut seisoa, että minä osoittaisin sinulle minun voimani, ja että minun nimeni julistettaisiin kaikessa maassa.
verses.king_james: And in very deed for this cause have I raised thee up, for to shew in thee my power; and that my name may be declared throughout all the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Adhuc retines populum meum, et non vis dimittere eum ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עוֹדְךָ֖ מִסְתּוֹלֵ֣ל בְּעַמִּ֑י לְבִלְתִּ֖י שַׁלְּחָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Dost thou yet hold back my people; and wilt thou not let them go?
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja vieläkös nyt ylennät itses minun kansani päälle, etkä päästä heitä:
verses.king_james: As yet exaltest thou thyself against my people, that thou wilt not let them go?

verses.latin_vulgate: En pluam cras hac ipsa hora grandinem multam nimis, qualis non fuit in Ægypto a die qua fundata est, usque in præsens tempus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנְנִ֤י מַמְטִיר֙ כָּעֵ֣ת מָחָ֔ר בָּרָ֖ד כָּבֵ֣ד מְאֹ֑ד אֲשֶׁ֨ר לֹא־הָיָ֤ה כָמֹ֙הוּ֙ בְּמִצְרַ֔יִם לְמִן־הַיּ֥וֹם הִוָּסְדָ֖הֿ וְעַד־עָֽתָּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Behold I will cause it to rain to morrow at this same hour, an exceeding great hail; such as hath not been in Egypt from the day that it was founded, until this present time.
verses.finnish_biblia: Katso, huomenna tällä ajalla annan minä sangen suuria rakeita sataa, jonka kaltaisia ei ole ollut Egyptissä, hamasta siitä päivästä kuin se perustettu on, niin tähän asti.
verses.king_james: Behold, to morrow about this time I will cause it to rain a very grievous hail, such as hath not been in Egypt since the foundation thereof even until now.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mitte ergo jam nunc, et congrega jumenta tua, et omnia quæ habes in agro : homines enim, et jumenta, et universa quæ inventa fuerint foris, nec congregata de agris, cecideritque super ea grando, morientur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַתָּ֗ה שְׁלַ֤ח הָעֵז֙ אֶֽת־מִקְנְךָ֔ וְאֵ֛ת כׇּל־אֲשֶׁ֥ר לְךָ֖ בַּשָּׂדֶ֑ה כׇּל־הָאָדָ֨ם וְהַבְּהֵמָ֜ה אֲשֶֽׁר־יִמָּצֵ֣א בַשָּׂדֶ֗ה וְלֹ֤א יֵֽאָסֵף֙ הַבַּ֔יְתָה וְיָרַ֧ד עֲלֵהֶ֛ם הַבָּרָ֖ד וָמֵֽתוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Send therefore now presently, and gather together thy cattle, and all that thou hast in the field; for men and beasts, and all things that shall be found abroad, and not gathered together out of the fields which the hail shall fall upon, shall die.
verses.finnish_biblia: Lähetä siis nyt ja korjaa sinun karjas ja kaikki mitä sinulla on kedolla; sillä kaikki ihmiset ja karja kuin kedolla löydetään, ja ei ole korjatut huoneesen, niiden päälle lankeevat rakeet ja heidän pitää kuoleman.
verses.king_james: Send therefore now, and gather thy cattle, and all that thou hast in the field; for upon every man and beast which shall be found in the field, and shall not be brought home, the hail shall come down upon them, and they shall die.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui timuit verbum Domini de servis Pharaonis, facit confugere servos suos et jumenta in domos :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַיָּרֵא֙ אֶת־דְּבַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֔ה מֵֽעַבְדֵ֖י פַּרְעֹ֑ה הֵנִ֛יס אֶת־עֲבָדָ֥יו וְאֶת־מִקְנֵ֖הוּ אֶל־הַבָּתִּֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: He that feared the word of the Lord among Pharao's servants, made his servants and his cattle flee into houses:
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka Pharaon palvelioista pelkäsi Herran sanaa, se palveliansa ja karjansa huoneesen korjasi,
verses.king_james: He that feared the word of the Lord among the servants of Pharaoh made his servants and his cattle flee into the houses:

verses.latin_vulgate: qui autem neglexit sermonem Domini, dimisit servos suos et jumenta in agris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲשֶׁ֥ר לֹא־שָׂ֛ם לִבּ֖וֹ אֶל־דְּבַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֑ה וַֽיַּעֲזֹ֛ב אֶת־עֲבָדָ֥יו וְאֶת־מִקְנֵ֖הוּ בַּשָּׂדֶֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: But he that regarded not the word of the Lord, left his servants, and his cattle in the fields.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaan jonka sydän ei totellut Herran sanaa, se jätti kedolle palveliansa ja karjansa.
verses.king_james: And he that regarded not the word of the Lord left his servants and his cattle in the field.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixit Dominus ad Moysen : Extende manum tuam in cælum, ut fiat grando in universa terra Ægypti super homines, et super jumenta, et super omnem herbam agri in terra Ægypti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֨אמֶר יְהֹוָ֜ה אֶל־מֹשֶׁ֗ה נְטֵ֤ה אֶת־יָֽדְךָ֙ עַל־הַשָּׁמַ֔יִם וִיהִ֥י בָרָ֖ד בְּכׇל־אֶ֣רֶץ מִצְרָ֑יִם עַל־הָאָדָ֣ם וְעַל־הַבְּהֵמָ֗ה וְעַ֛ל כׇּל־עֵ֥שֶׂב הַשָּׂדֶ֖ה בְּאֶ֥רֶץ מִצְרָֽיִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord said to Moses: Stretch forth thy hand towards heaven, that there may be hail in the whole land of Egypt upon men, and upon beasts, and upon every herb of the field in the land of Egypt.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin sanoi Herra Mosekselle: ojenna kätes taivaasen päin, että rakeita satais koko Egyptin maan päälle: ihmisten päälle, karjan päälle, ja kaikkein päälle, mitä kedolla vihottaa Egyptin maalla.
verses.king_james: And the Lord said unto Moses, Stretch forth thine hand toward heaven, that there may be hail in all the land of Egypt, upon man, and upon beast, and upon every herb of the field, throughout the land of Egypt.

verses.latin_vulgate: Extenditque Moyses virgam in cælum, et Dominus dedit tonitrua, et grandinem, ac discurrentia fulgura super terram : pluitque Dominus grandinem super terram Ægypti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֨ט מֹשֶׁ֣ה אֶת־מַטֵּ֘הוּ֮ עַל־הַשָּׁמַ֒יִם֒ וַֽיהֹוָ֗ה נָתַ֤ן קֹלֹת֙ וּבָרָ֔ד וַתִּ֥הֲלַךְ אֵ֖שׁ אָ֑רְצָה וַיַּמְטֵ֧ר יְהֹוָ֛ה בָּרָ֖ד עַל־אֶ֥רֶץ מִצְרָֽיִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Moses stretched forth his rod towards heaven, and the Lord sent thunder and hail, and lightnings running along the ground: and the Lord rained hail upon the land of Egypt.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin ojensi Moses sauvansa taivaasen päin, että Herra antais jylistä ja rakeita sataa, ja että pitkäisen tuli leimahtelis maan päälle; ja Herra antoi sataa rakeita Egyptin maan päälle,
verses.king_james: And Moses stretched forth his rod toward heaven: and the Lord sent thunder and hail, and the fire ran along upon the ground; and the Lord rained hail upon the land of Egypt.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et grando et ignis mista pariter ferebantur : tantæque fuit magnitudinis, quanta ante numquam apparuit in universa terra Ægypti ex quo gens illa condita est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֣י בָרָ֔ד וְאֵ֕שׁ מִתְלַקַּ֖חַת בְּת֣וֹךְ הַבָּרָ֑ד כָּבֵ֣ד מְאֹ֔ד אֲ֠שֶׁ֠ר לֹֽא־הָיָ֤ה כָמֹ֙הוּ֙ בְּכׇל־אֶ֣רֶץ מִצְרַ֔יִם מֵאָ֖ז הָיְתָ֥ה לְגֽוֹי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the hail and fire mixt with it drove on together: and it was of so great bigness, as never before was seen in the whole land of Egypt since that nation was founded.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että rakeet ja tuli sekaisin maahan lankesivat, niin raskaasti, ettei ikänänsä senkaltaista kaikessa Egyptin maassa tapahtunut ollut, siitä ajasta kuin kansa siinä asumaan rupesi.
verses.king_james: So there was hail, and fire mingled with the hail, very grievous, such as there was none like it in all the land of Egypt since it became a nation.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et percussit grando in omni terra Ægypti cuncta quæ fuerunt in agris, ab homine usque ad jumentum : cunctamque herbam agri percussit grando, et omne lignum regionis confregit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֨ךְ הַבָּרָ֜ד בְּכׇל־אֶ֣רֶץ מִצְרַ֗יִם אֵ֚ת כׇּל־אֲשֶׁ֣ר בַּשָּׂדֶ֔ה מֵאָדָ֖ם וְעַד־בְּהֵמָ֑ה וְאֵ֨ת כׇּל־עֵ֤שֶׂב הַשָּׂדֶה֙ הִכָּ֣ה הַבָּרָ֔ד וְאֶת־כׇּל־עֵ֥ץ הַשָּׂדֶ֖ה שִׁבֵּֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the hail destroyed through all the land of Egypt all things that were in the fields, both man and beast: and the hail smote every herb of the field, and it broke every tree of the country.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja rakeet löivät koko Egyptin maalla kaikki kuin kedolla olivat, sekä ihmiset että karjan: niin myös koko maan vihannan löivät rakeet kaikki, myös puut kedolla särkivät rikki.
verses.king_james: And the hail smote throughout all the land of Egypt all that was in the field, both man and beast; and the hail smote every herb of the field, and brake every tree of the field.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tantum in terra Gessen, ubi erant filii Israël, grando non cecidit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רַ֚ק בְּאֶ֣רֶץ גֹּ֔שֶׁן אֲשֶׁר־שָׁ֖ם בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל לֹ֥א הָיָ֖ה בָּרָֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: Only in the land of Gessen, where the children of Israel were, the hail fell not.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ainoasti Gosenin maakunnassa, jossa Israelin lapset olivat, ei rakeita ollut.
verses.king_james: Only in the land of Goshen, where the children of Israel were, was there no hail.

verses.latin_vulgate: Misitque Pharao, et vocavit Moysen et Aaron, dicens ad eos : Peccavi etiam nunc : Dominus justus ; ego et populus meus, impii.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁלַ֣ח פַּרְעֹ֗ה וַיִּקְרָא֙ לְמֹשֶׁ֣ה וּֽלְאַהֲרֹ֔ן וַיֹּ֥אמֶר אֲלֵהֶ֖ם חָטָ֣אתִי הַפָּ֑עַם יְהֹוָה֙ הַצַּדִּ֔יק וַאֲנִ֥י וְעַמִּ֖י הָרְשָׁעִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Pharao sent and called Moses and Aaron, saying to them: I have sinned this time also, the Lord is just: I and my people, are wicked.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin lähetti Pharao ja kutsui Moseksen ja Aaronin, ja sanoi heille: minä olen tällä haavalla pahoin tehnyt; Herra on vanhurskas, vaan minä ja minun kansani olemme jumalattomat.
verses.king_james: And Pharaoh sent, and called for Moses and Aaron, and said unto them, I have sinned this time: the Lord is righteous, and I and my people are wicked.

verses.latin_vulgate: Orate Dominum ut desinant tonitrua Dei, et grando : ut dimittam vos, et nequaquam hic ultra maneatis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַעְתִּ֙ירוּ֙ אֶל־יְהֹוָ֔ה וְרַ֕ב מִֽהְיֹ֛ת קֹלֹ֥ת אֱלֹהִ֖ים וּבָרָ֑ד וַאֲשַׁלְּחָ֣ה אֶתְכֶ֔ם וְלֹ֥א תֹסִפ֖וּן לַעֲמֹֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: Pray ye to the Lord that the thunderings of God and the hail may cease: that I may let you go, and that ye may stay here no longer.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden rukoilkaat Herraa, että jo kyllä olis, ja että Jumalan jylinä ja rakeet lakkaisivat: niin minä päästän teidät, eikä teidän pidä enempi täällä viipymän.
verses.king_james: Intreat the Lord (for it is enough) that there be no more mighty thunderings and hail; and I will let you go, and ye shall stay no longer.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ait Moyses : Cum egressus fuero de urbe, extendam palmas meas ad Dominum, et cessabunt tonitrua, et grando non erit, ut scias quia Domini est terra :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר אֵלָיו֙ מֹשֶׁ֔ה כְּצֵאתִי֙ אֶת־הָעִ֔יר אֶפְרֹ֥שׂ אֶת־כַּפַּ֖י אֶל־יְהֹוָ֑ה הַקֹּל֣וֹת יֶחְדָּל֗וּן וְהַבָּרָד֙ לֹ֣א יִֽהְיֶה־ע֔וֹד לְמַ֣עַן תֵּדַ֔ע כִּ֥י לַיהֹוָ֖ה הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Moses said: As soon as I am gone out of the city, I will stretch forth my hands to the Lord, and the thunders shall cease, and the hail shall be no more: that thou mayst know that the earth is the Lord's:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Moses sanoi hänelle: koska minä lähden kaupungista, niin minä ojennan käteni Herran tykö: niin jylinä lakkaa ja rakeita ei pidä enempi oleman, ettäs tietäisit maan olevan Herran.
verses.king_james: And Moses said unto him, As soon as I am gone out of the city, I will spread abroad my hands unto the Lord; and the thunder shall cease, neither shall there be any more hail; that thou mayest know how that the earth is the Lord’s.

verses.latin_vulgate: novi autem quod et tu et servi tui necdum timeatis Dominum Deum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתָּ֖ה וַעֲבָדֶ֑יךָ יָדַ֕עְתִּי כִּ֚י טֶ֣רֶם תִּֽירְא֔וּן מִפְּנֵ֖י יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: But I know that neither thou, nor thy servants do yet fear the Lord God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta et sinä ja sinun palvelias, minä kyllä tiedän, vielä nytkään pelkää Herraa Jumalaa.
verses.king_james: But as for thee and thy servants, I know that ye will not yet fear the Lord God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Linum ergo et hordeum læsum est, eo quod hordeum esset virens, et linum jam folliculos germinaret :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַפִּשְׁתָּ֥ה וְהַשְּׂעֹרָ֖ה נֻכָּ֑תָה כִּ֤י הַשְּׂעֹרָה֙ אָבִ֔יב וְהַפִּשְׁתָּ֖ה גִּבְעֹֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: The flax therefore, and the barley were hurt, because the barley was green, and the flax was now bolled;
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin pellavat ja ohrat maahan lyötiin; sillä ohra oli tähkäpäällä ja pellava oli kulkulla.
verses.king_james: And the flax and the barley was smitten: for the barley was in the ear, and the flax was bolled.

verses.latin_vulgate: triticum autem et far non sunt læsa, quia serotina erant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַחִטָּ֥ה וְהַכֻּסֶּ֖מֶת לֹ֣א נֻכּ֑וּ כִּ֥י אֲפִילֹ֖ת הֵֽנָּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: But the wheat, and other winter corn were not hurt, because they were lateward.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta nisu ja kaura (a) ei turmeltuneet, sillä ne olivat hiljakylvöt. (a) Spelta eli Turkin kaura.
verses.king_james: But the wheat and the rie were not smitten: for they were not grown up.

verses.latin_vulgate: Egressusque Moyses a Pharaone ex urbe, tetendit manus ad Dominum : et cessaverunt tonitrua et grando, nec ultra stillavit pluvia super terram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּצֵ֨א מֹשֶׁ֜ה מֵעִ֤ם פַּרְעֹה֙ אֶת־הָעִ֔יר וַיִּפְרֹ֥שׂ כַּפָּ֖יו אֶל־יְהֹוָ֑ה וַֽיַּחְדְּל֤וּ הַקֹּלוֹת֙ וְהַבָּרָ֔ד וּמָטָ֖ר לֹא־נִתַּ֥ךְ אָֽרְצָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when Moses was gone from Pharao out of the city, he stretched forth his hands to the Lord: and the thunders and the hail ceased, neither did there drop any more rain upon the earth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Moses meni ulos kaupungista Pharaon tyköä, ja ojensi kätensä Herran tykö: ja jylinä ja rakeet lakkasivat, ja sade ei enempi vuodatettu maan päälle.
verses.king_james: And Moses went out of the city from Pharaoh, and spread abroad his hands unto the Lord: and the thunders and hail ceased, and the rain was not poured upon the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Videns autem Pharao quod cessasset pluvia, et grando, et tonitrua, auxit peccatum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֣רְא פַּרְעֹ֗ה כִּֽי־חָדַ֨ל הַמָּטָ֧ר וְהַבָּרָ֛ד וְהַקֹּלֹ֖ת וַיֹּ֣סֶף לַחֲטֹ֑א וַיַּכְבֵּ֥ד לִבּ֖וֹ ה֥וּא וַעֲבָדָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Pharao seeing that the rain, and the hail, and the thunders were ceased, increased his sin:
verses.finnish_biblia: Koska Pharao näki, että sade, ja rakeet, ja jylinät lakkasivat, teki hän vielä enemmin pahaa, ja paadutti sydämensä, sekä hän että hänen palveliansa.
verses.king_james: And when Pharaoh saw that the rain and the hail and the thunders were ceased, he sinned yet more, and hardened his heart, he and his servants.

verses.latin_vulgate: et ingravatum est cor ejus, et servorum illius, et induratum nimis : nec dimisit filios Israël, sicut præceperat Dominus per manum Moysi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֶּֽחֱזַק֙ לֵ֣ב פַּרְעֹ֔ה וְלֹ֥א שִׁלַּ֖ח אֶת־בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל כַּאֲשֶׁ֛ר דִּבֶּ֥ר יְהֹוָ֖ה בְּיַד־מֹשֶֽׁה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And his heart was hardened, and the heart of his servants, and it was made exceeding hard: neither did he let the children of Israel go, as the Lord had commanded by the hand of Moses.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin paatui Pharaon sydän, ja ei päästänyt Israelin lapsia: niinkuin Herra Moseksen kautta sanonut oli.
verses.king_james: And the heart of Pharaoh was hardened, neither would he let the children of Israel go; as the Lord had spoken by Moses.
